typecheck.detail: No typecheck command configured in services.yaml

lint.detail: No lint command configured in services.yaml

fvg-detector.summary: Clean implementation faithfully reproducing pipeline detect_fvgs() logic. 22 tests, all 3 TF regression exact match. Non-blocking: BPR O(n²) complexity, session mapping not centralized, BPR tests lack fixture regression.

swing-points-detector.summary: Correct N-bar pivot with equality fix, strength capping, height sentinel. 18 tests, all 3 TF regression exact. Non-blocking: dead is_ghost parameter, utility function duplication.

displacement-detector.summary: All three qualification paths (cluster_2, single_atr, single_override) correctly implemented in evaluation order. 22 tests, all TF regression exact, grade distribution matches. Non-blocking: utility duplication, FVG gap logic duplication, implicit floor_threshold_pips default.

supporting-leaf-detectors.summary: All 4 detectors implemented correctly. 59 tests, 15 session boxes match, Asia ranges match, reference levels exact. Non-blocking: missing ghost bar filtering (matches pipeline), unused max_cap_pips, hardcoded thresholds in AsiaRange.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: Extract shared utility functions (_SESSION_MAP, _map_session(), _bar_time_str(), PIP constant) into a common module (e.g., ra.detectors._common or ra.engine.utils) before implementing composite detectors. All 4 leaf detectors duplicate these identically, and composites will need them too.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All 4 reviewed detectors (fvg.py, swing_points.py, displacement.py, supporting detectors) define identical _SESSION_MAP, _map_session(), _bar_time_str() helpers. 3 of 4 reviewers flagged this as non-blocking tech debt. AGENTS.md already mentions it as a recommendation but doesn't mandate it.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify ghost bar filtering convention: 'All candle-pattern detectors (FVG, displacement, swing points) must skip ghost bars. Session-aggregate detectors (session_liquidity, asia_range, reference_levels) do NOT filter ghost bars, matching pipeline behavior. Ghost bar filtering applies only to detectors that reason about individual bar OHLC patterns, not aggregate session range computations.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: FVG, displacement, swing_points all check is_ghost. Session_liquidity, asia_range, reference_levels do not — matching pipeline behavior. Current AGENTS.md says 'All detectors must skip bars where is_ghost == True' which is overly broad and contradicts pipeline ground truth for aggregate detectors. Supporting-leaf-detectors reviewer flagged this convention gap.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note about AsiaRangeDetector hardcoded thresholds: acknowledge this as a known deviation from the config-driven principle, to be addressed when asia_range config section is formalized. The thresholds [12, 15, 18, 20, 25, 30] should be moved to locked_baseline.yaml.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: AsiaRangeDetector uses _DEFAULT_THRESHOLDS = [12, 15, 18, 20, 25, 30] at module level instead of reading from config. AGENTS.md states: 'Config-driven: Every L1.5 parameter lives in YAML config.' Reviewer flagged as convention violation.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker's skillFeedback.suggestedChanges notes build_plan/02_MODULE_MANIFEST.md has outdated regression expectations for swing points (says 5m: 163, 15m: ~45) vs actual baseline (5m: 267, 15m: 124).
rejectedObservations.reason: build_plan/ is off-limits (read-only). Feature descriptions in features.json had correct numbers. Workers should use baseline fixtures as ground truth, not manifest estimates.

rejectedObservations.observation: Skill feedback from FVG reviewer suggesting adding session label mismatch as a known gotcha to skill.
rejectedObservations.reason: Already addressed — AGENTS.md was updated with 'Session Label Mapping (All Detectors)' section during the FVG detector implementation. No further skill change needed.
